title: Healthcare and Mobile-first Platforms — United Kingdom
summary: Healthcare communications, portal, CMS, webcast, and mobile-first platform work in the United Kingdom.
claims: Joz worked on healthcare communications and digital platforms in the United Kingdom for Roche, Pfizer, and Vantas.
The programme covered webcasts, portal CMS work, and mobile-first platforms without implying clinical ownership.
proof_points: This record is scoped to platform and communication delivery rather than medical or clinical claims.
A dedicated healthcare industry tag is used because the existing ontology previously lacked one.
source_notes: Grouped programme record. Healthcare industry ID added because the controlled ontology previously lacked a safe healthcare bucket.
